Apple Will Close 11 Stores As COVID-19 Cases Flare Up In Some States
summary:
Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) is temporarily closing certain stores in the U.S. as fresh surges of COVID-19 cases arise, according to Reuters.

The 11 store closures are located in South, North Carolina, Arizona and Florida.
